# Raven Data Insights

> Geopolitical and financial risk analysis with a public, scored audit trail. Every prediction documented before the fact, dated, weighted by conviction, and scored when it resolves. Founded by Christophe van Eysendyck.

Raven Data Insights publishes falsifiable geopolitical and financial predictions — not hedged scenario matrices or narrative-driven consulting. The track record is public: hits and misses, weighted and explained.

The analysis draws on macroeconomics, geopolitical history, market structure, and cross-disciplinary structural thinking. The focus is on tectonic shifts: debt dynamics, demographic trajectories, energy dependencies, alliance fragmentation — forces that move slowly until they don't.

The site is designed for decision-makers: capital allocators, risk managers, board advisors, and anyone who needs geopolitical clarity they can verify independently.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://realistdata.com/): Overview of methodology, approach, and services offered
- [Call Map](https://realistdata.com/map): Interactive world map of all geopolitical and financial predictions, plotted by region with outcome status (correct, missed, ongoing, passive)
- [Calls & Scoring](https://realistdata.com/calls): Full scored ledger of predictions from 2023 onwards, with weighted accuracy methodology
- [Contact](https://realistdata.com/contact): Inquiry form for tailored briefings, scenario analysis, and custom reports

## Methodology

Predictions are scored using a weighted system introduced in 2025:
- ★★ Important (weight 2): High-conviction structural calls
- ★ Normal (weight 1): Standard directional calls
- — Passive (weight 0): Calls that something would *not* happen; tracked but excluded from weighted score

Weighted accuracy = sum of weights of correct calls ÷ sum of weights of all resolved non-passive calls. For 2023–2024, all calls carry equal weight (1 point correct, 0 for missed).

## Written Analysis

- [Substack — Notes from the Ledge](https://substack.com/@fromtheledge): Full-length analyses behind each call, including reasoning, caveats, and updates
- [LinkedIn Newsletter](https://www.linkedin.com/newsletters/notes-from-the-ledge-6951182737105936385/): Cross-posted analysis on LinkedIn

## Services

Tailored geopolitical briefings, macro scenario analysis, pre-decision second opinions, and custom reports. Contact via [the contact page](https://realistdata.com/contact).

## Key Facts

- Tracking predictions publicly since 2023
- Based in Antwerp, Belgium
- All calls documented before the fact — no retroactive editing
- Analysis covers geopolitics, macro finance, conflict dynamics, energy, and trade
